headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops On U.S.-Iran News; Oil Prices Continue To Rally (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dropped Monday on the latest U.S.-Iran news. Oil prices continued to rally, topping $105 a barrel.
